description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior features large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces, and a prominent balcony with a white railing runs along the front facade. The house includes multiple bedrooms, a living area, and a kitchen, all visible through the open floor plan. The backyard is landscaped with green grass, a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a fire pit area, providing ample outdoor living space. The structure is primarily constructed from light gray concrete or masonry, with glass and metal accents. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor areas, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool and lounge area. The design is contemporary with clean lines and extensive outdoor living space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, a balcony with white railing, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bedrooms, balcony extension, and a glimpse of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, fire pit, and extensive green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional outdoor seating, and the pool area adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, balcony overhang, and minimalistic steps leading to the entrance
